meta.ontologyNote: Descriptive former principles reclassified as signals. Principles reserved for real decision rules.

nodes.name: Station F
nodes.summary: Startup campus in Paris's 13th arrondissement, often cited as the world's largest startup facility.

nodes.name: Bpifrance
nodes.summary: French public investment bank co-owned by Caisse des Dépôts and EPIC Bpifrance Group.

nodes.name: La French Tech
nodes.summary: French government mission supporting startup ecosystem structuring and growth in France and abroad.

nodes.name: France Digitale
nodes.summary: Association of French tech entrepreneurs and investors representing startups and VCs.

nodes.name: Inria
nodes.summary: French national research institute for digital science and technology, historically IRIA/INRIA.

nodes.name: CNRS
nodes.summary: French National Centre for Scientific Research, Europe's largest public research organisation.

nodes.name: CNIL
nodes.summary: French data protection authority overseeing personal data collection, storage, and use.

nodes.name: ANR
nodes.summary: French National Research Agency funding competitive research projects including AI programmes.

nodes.name: PEPR IA
nodes.summary: French Priority Research Programme and Equipment initiative focused on artificial intelligence.

nodes.name: Hi! PARIS
nodes.summary: Interdisciplinary AI and data science centre backed by Institut Polytechnique de Paris and HEC Paris.

nodes.name: MIAI Grenoble Alpes
nodes.summary: Multidisciplinary Institute in Artificial Intelligence at Université Grenoble Alpes.

nodes.name: European AI Office
nodes.summary: European Commission body supporting implementation and enforcement of the EU AI Act.

nodes.name: EU AI Act framework
nodes.summary: EU regulatory framework on artificial intelligence addressing AI risks across the Single Market.

nodes.name: EuroHPC Joint Undertaking
nodes.summary: EU joint undertaking building and operating world-class supercomputing and AI compute infrastructure.

nodes.name: École Polytechnique
nodes.summary: French grande école specializing in science and engineering; founding member of IP Paris.

nodes.name: Télécom Paris
nodes.summary: Engineering grande école focused on digital technologies, member of Institut Polytechnique de Paris.

nodes.name: ENS PSL
nodes.summary: École normale supérieure within Paris Sciences et Lettres University, strong in fundamental research.

nodes.name: PSL University
nodes.summary: Collegiate research university in Paris with 11 constituent schools including ENS.

nodes.name: HEC Paris
nodes.summary: French business school and grande école partnering on AI and entrepreneurship programmes.

nodes.name: CentraleSupélec
nodes.summary: Engineering grande école within Université Paris-Saclay and Institut Polytechnique de Paris.

nodes.name: Mistral AI
nodes.summary: French AI company founded in 2023 that develops large language models, including open-weight releases.

nodes.name: Kyutai
nodes.summary: Paris open-science AI lab aiming to build and democratize AGI through open research.

nodes.name: Hugging Face

nodes.name: H Company

nodes.summary: Paris company building AI agent platforms for enterprise workflows; Series A led by Sequoia.

nodes.summary: Paris company developing large language models and generative AI infrastructure for enterprises.

nodes.name: Gladia

nodes.name: Probabl

nodes.statement: By end-2029 Bpifrance will have deployed or committed roughly €10B in AI-related support as announced in early 2025.

anchoredToEvent.what: Bpifrance public communications on a ~€10B AI support envelope through 2029

nodes.statement: GPAI provider obligations under the EU AI Act remain in force and materially shape EU model deployment practices through 2026.

anchoredToEvent.what: EU AI Act GPAI obligations application date (August 2025)

nodes.statement: High-risk AI system obligations under the EU AI Act will apply from August 2026 without multi-year delay.

anchoredToEvent.what: Scheduled application of high-risk AI Act obligations

nodes.statement: European frontier labs can compete by releasing capable open-weight models rather than only closed APIs.
nodes.quote: Mistral AI SAS is a French artificial intelligence (AI) company headquartered in Paris.

nodes.statement: Open science is a viable institutional form for European AGI research laboratories.
nodes.quote: Our mission is to build and democratize artificial general intelligence through open science.

nodes.statement: Shared model hubs lower the cost of building ML applications across ecosystems.
nodes.quote: Its transformers library built for natural language processing applications and its platform

nodes.statement: Physical density of startups can itself be an ecosystem advantage.
nodes.quote: It is noted as the world's largest startup facility.

nodes.statement: Public investment banks are central capital actors in the French tech ecosystem.
nodes.quote: Bpifrance also known as the Banque publique d'investissement is a French public sector investment bank.

nodes.statement: State coordination missions can structure national startup growth at home and abroad.
nodes.quote: La mission French Tech est chargée de soutenir la structuration et la croissance de l’écosystème des start-up françaises, en France et à l’international.

nodes.statement: The EU treats comprehensive AI risk regulation as a global leadership lever.
nodes.quote: The AI Act is the first-ever legal framework on AI, which addresses the risks of AI and positions Europe to play a leading role globally.

nodes.statement: A single EU AI legal framework is intended to govern AI across member states.
nodes.quote: It establishes a common regulatory and legal framework for AI within the European Union (EU).

nodes.statement: National digital-science institutes anchor long-horizon French AI capability.
nodes.quote: The National Institute for Research in Digital Science and Technology (Inria) is a French national research institution focusing on computer science and applied mathematics.

nodes.statement: Privacy regulators shape how AI systems may collect and process personal data in France.
nodes.quote: whose mission is to ensure that data privacy law is applied to the collection, storage, and use of personal data.

nodes.statement: Large public research bodies remain foundational to European scientific capacity.
nodes.quote: is the largest public research body in Europe and the second largest research organisation in the world.

nodes.statement: Frontier agent labs frame value as automating complex human work.
nodes.quote: H Company builds models, agents, and products that automate tasks and simplify complex work.

nodes.statement: Frontier model companies increasingly package open models into enterprise platforms.
nodes.quote: Customize, fine-tune, and deploy AI assistants, autonomous agents, and multimodal AI with open models.

nodes.statement: Enterprise AI platforms can scale globally while retaining French founding roots.
nodes.quote: Dataiku is a French-American artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning company which was founded in 2013 in Paris, France.

nodes.statement: Large annual tech conferences concentrate capital, talent, and policy attention.
nodes.quote: Viva Technology, or VivaTech, is an annual technology conference, dedicated to innovation and startups, held in Paris, France.

nodes.statement: Hosting a global tech summit can reposition a Southern European capital in venture networks.
nodes.quote: Web Summit is an annual technology conference held in Lisbon, Portugal.

nodes.statement: Industry trade shows remain primary distribution channels for mobile and adjacent AI products.
nodes.quote: MWC Barcelona, formerly known as the Mobile World Congress, is an annual trade show intended for the mobile communications industry.

nodes.statement: Low-code vendors reposition around AI app and agent development platforms.
nodes.quote: OutSystems is an AI development platform designed for building, deploying, and managing AI apps and agents to accelerate enterprise development.

nodes.statement: Real-time ML for payments fraud is a durable Southern European AI export niche.
nodes.quote: Feedzai is a data science company that develops real-time machine learning tools to identify fraudulent payment transactions and minimize risk.

nodes.statement: Founder-researchers are central public faces of Europe’s frontier AI labs.
nodes.quote: Arthur Mensch is a French artificial intelligence researcher and entrepreneur, best known as the co-founder and CEO of the Paris-based AI company Mistral AI.

nodes.statement: Operator-investors can underwrite both campuses and open-science labs in France.
nodes.quote: Xavier Niel is a French billionaire entrepreneur and investor.

nodes.statement: Campus directors are ecosystem institutions in their own right.
nodes.quote: Roxanne Varza is Director of Station F, a startup campus, the world's biggest facility of its kind, based in Paris, France.

nodes.statement: Grandes écoles remain primary talent pipelines for French deeptech and AI.
nodes.quote: École polytechnique is a grande école located in Palaiseau, France. It specializes in science and engineering.

nodes.statement: Large French multi-strategy investors bridge venture, growth, and buyout capital.
nodes.quote: Eurazeo is a French private equity firm and investment group headquartered in Paris.

nodes.statement: Accelerators package capital with mentorship as a repeatable early-stage product.
nodes.quote: The accelerator provides capital, mentorship, and other support for early-stage entrepreneurs.

nodes.statement: Digital experience analytics is a French AI-software export category.
nodes.quote: Contentsquare is a French artificial intelligence company founded in 2012 by Jonathan Cherki.
